title: Advanced AI Systems
description: Advanced topics in artificial intelligence covering multi-agent systems, automated planning, knowledge graphs, ethical AI, and large language models. Students study multi-agent coordination, STRIPS-style planning, ontologies and semantic web, fairness and bias in AI systems, and the architecture of modern foundation models. Projects involve building complex AI systems that integrate multiple techniques. CS306 (AI) is the prerequisite for foundational AI knowledge including search, reasoning, and probabilistic methods.
outcomes: Design multi-agent systems with coordination protocols
Evaluate AI systems for fairness and bias
Apply prompt engineering techniques with LLMs
Analyze AI safety and ethical implications
